extraction.one_line_summary: URAN Rigoberto won stage 9 after a crash with Martin destroyed his derailleur, forcing him to sprint in his biggest gear 53x11 only.
tactical_patterns: FROOME weaponized Mont du Chat descent preparation from months prior, forcing rivals to match his technical speed or lose time.
ARU Fabio correctly attacked FROOME's mechanical on final climb despite unwritten rules, proving 2017 peloton prioritizes opportunism over etiquette.
SUNWEB placed MATTHEWS in breakaway on HC climbs to steal green jersey points when sprinters absent, expanding points classification tactics.
FUGLSANG inexplicably cooperated with yellow jersey FROOME in chase instead of letting him work alone, gifting time bonuses to GC leader.

rider_signals.PORT Richie: negative: pre-race favorite abandoned after 45mph crash attempting to match FROOME's technical descent speed, revealing skill gap
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: gained 4 seconds on ARU via time bonus despite mechanical, demonstrating stage reconnaissance pays dividends on technical descents
rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: positive: won mountain stage photo finish sprinting in only 53x11 after derailleur destroyed, showing resilience compensates for mechanical disaster
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: crashed at 45mph with PORT but regrouped to finish 9th, exceptional recovery suggests undertapped resilience in adversity
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: neutral: attacked FROOME's mechanical correctly but couldn't follow on descent, establishing technical descending as his GC weakness
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: lost over 2 minutes on stage FROOME marked as hardest, signaling he lacks explosive climbing to compete for yellow
